sb_prompt: DISCUSS POSSIBLE CHANGES IN THE WAY TRIALS BY JURY ARE CONDUCTED.     FOR EXAMPLE
turns: Hi, I recently read an article about how trials by jury could be conducted differently to improve the legal system.
That sounds interesting. How do you think they should change it?
Well, one idea I read was to have more diverse juries, so cases are heard by people from different backgrounds and perspectives.

That makes sense."

"Definitely.
Another suggestion was to make the selection process for jurors more random, instead of allowing people to opt out or postpone their service.

Seems fair."
